side_effects.description: Sting develops after pH drops and solution becomes more acidic over time

protocol_notes: Reconstitutes GHK-Cu in phosphate buffered saline (PBS) instead of BAC to maintain pH stability and keep GHK-Cu coordination bond intact, which reduces copper-induced stinging. Notes that if GHK and Cu are not bonded, copper causes the sting but GHK still provides benefits.
